productDisplayName: Nike Unisex All Access FU Green Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. With the nike Athletic Department badges appliqued strategically, there's no way anyone can miss observing your style statement. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag also makes for a great everyday wear to school, college and even work, considering it has ample padding to keep your laptop safe for short distance travels.Height: 19" Width: 13" Depth: 8" Capacity: 31 litres Made of polyester with a nylon and polyester lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a separator to hold the laptop and its essentials, with side adjustable straps to secure belongings One front zippered compartment One velcro flap pouch on the front with an appliqued swoosh badge for style Open side pouched with separate zippered compartments on top for extra space Synthetic padded haul loops on the top and bottom for handling and cleaning ease Wide, adjustable padded handles for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Loops on handles to hold an MP3 player or a pen when trekking, with embroidered swoosh on left handle for style Ergonomically padded back for carrying comfort with embroidered swoosh silhouette for style Care Hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
